title: hearth.voice.pipeline v1
description: Emitted by hearth-nbus after the voice intent pipeline processes an audio snippet. Includes routing and latency so consumers can detect anomalies in the voice path.

intent_class.description: Classified intent from the voice pipeline (e.g. 'device_control', 'query', 'chat').

latency_ms.description: Total pipeline latency in milliseconds from audio snippet to intent result.

routed_to.description: Target component or agent the intent was routed to for execution.

success.description: True if the pipeline completed without error; false if the routing or execution failed.
